victim.value: Three armed men (leader, Kong, and machete man) killed in self-defense during confrontation
victim.quote: I glanced toward the four bodies leaking fluids into the parched earth.

closed_world.value: Remote location with ruined temple, isolated enough for armed confrontation
closed_world.quote: if ugly was a brick, you'd be that ruined temple over there.

culprit_and_motive.value: Armed men seeking 'the girl' and targeting Simon specifically, motive unclear
culprit_and_motive.quote: They were here for the girl and for me! I was pretty sure I wasn't supposed to leave here alive.

investigator.value: Simon, first-person narrator who becomes involved in violent confrontation
investigator.quote: So, Mister Big-Shot- Simon, not so big now, huh

red_herring.value: Initial assumption this was a random bandit stickup masks the fact they specifically targeted Simon and the girl
red_herring.quote: A jolt ran through my body as I realized this was no bandit stickup. They were here for the girl and for me!

clue_fairness.value: The antagonist's knowledge of Simon's name is revealed to both Simon and reader simultaneously
clue_fairness.quote: So, Mister Big-Shot- Simon, not so big now, huh

reveal_mechanic.value: The leader's specific knowledge of Simon's name reveals this is a targeted operation, not random crime
reveal_mechanic.quote: How did he know my name? What was going on here?

investigator_wound.value: Simon experiences guilt and psychological burden from killing even in self-defense situations
investigator_wound.quote: Sometimes, even that didn't ease the pangs of guilt.

_meta.title: ebook p j lawton lethal knowledge excerpt
